task: Implement Pro in-memory run creation and storage: add a create-run request/builder in the Rust domain crate, add API state plus POST /api/runs while keeping list/detail/graph backed by the in-memory store, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence.

continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
